title: Consciousness for Eternity (CoE): A Substrate-Brane Framework for Consciousness, Time, and Cosmology
description: A working metaphysical framework that treats consciousness as a passive cross-slice reader within a block universe hosted by a pre-geometric substrate, integrating relativity, quantum-information no-go theorems, the filter/transmission theory of mind, and cyclic cosmology. Every claim is tagged by epistemic status ([Fact] / [Fact-eq] / [Hypo]) with sources; where the framework's conclusions are independently reached by published researchers they are cited for priority, not confirmation. Presented as a self-aware lens, not a falsified theory. The single source of truth is the Markdown document; the full changelog is in Appendix A.
